positive: A stylized, symmetrical mountain range silhouette against a vibrant sunset sky. The scene includes layered foothills and sharp peaks, rendered with solid color blocks and clean lines. The foreground has stylized, geometric plant life and minimalist fauna (e.g., small deer, soaring birds) silhouetted against the bright sky. Style: Flat vector graphic, Pop Art influence, Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetic meeting modern geometric design. Composition: Perfect central placement, high contrast, utilizing a limited, vibrant palette of magenta, deep indigo, burnt orange, and teal. Lighting: Backlit, emphasizing sharp edges and clean negative space. Suitable for repeat pattern or centerpiece apparel design.
negative: photorealistic, 3D render, noisy, grainy, blur, text, signature, watermark, logos, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, muddy colors, gradient sky
